name: chatwire-apprise
description: Push notifications to ntfy, Slack, Discord, Pushover, and 80+ services via Apprise.
author: allenbina

name: chatwire-telegram
description: Relay iMessages to and from a Telegram bot. Two-way bridge with full group chat support.
author: allenbina

name: chatwire-webhook
description: POST every inbound iMessage to a webhook URL. Build automations with Zapier, n8n, and anything that speaks HTTP.
author: allenbina

name: chatwire-stats
description: Message statistics dashboard — charts for message volume, response times, and top contacts.
author: allenbina

name: chatwire-theme-rosepine
description: Rosé Pine color family — three variants: base (dark), Moon (dark), and Dawn (light).
author: allenbina

name: chatwire-example
description: Example plugin for testing install/uninstall. Does nothing.
author: allenbina

name: chatwire-mqtt
description: Publish every inbound iMessage to an MQTT broker. Integrates with Home Assistant, Node-RED, OpenHAB, and any MQTT subscriber.
author: allenbina

name: chatwire-ha
description: Control Home Assistant automations, scenes, and services by typing keywords into iMessage.
author: allenbina

name: chatwire-xmpp
description: Bridge iMessage ↔ XMPP (Jabber) for whitelisted contacts. Two-way relay via slixmpp.
author: allenbina
